trans-unit.target: Annulation en cours de la session de test... Merci de patienter.

trans-unit.note: Heading printed before the per-module code coverage percentages in the run summary.

trans-unit.source: Console is already in batching mode.
trans-unit.target: La console est déjà en mode de traitement par lot.
trans-unit.note: Exception that is thrown when console is already collecting input into a batch (into a string builder), and code asks to enable batching mode again.
Label for the average-across-scopes statistic used in a coverage threshold comparison (e.g. 'Line (Average): ...').
Label for the maximum-across-scopes statistic used in a coverage threshold comparison (e.g. 'Line (Maximum): ...').
Label for the minimum-across-scopes statistic used in a coverage threshold comparison (e.g. 'Line (Minimum): ...').
Coverage threshold aggregation description. {0} is the aggregation label and {1} is the population scope level.
Label for the total (aggregate) statistic used in a coverage threshold comparison (e.g. 'Line (Total): ...').
Label for block code coverage in the coverage summary (e.g. 'Total - Block: 95.0%').
Label for branch code coverage in the coverage summary (e.g. 'Total - Branch: 95.0%').
Label for class code coverage in the coverage summary (e.g. 'Total - Class: 95.0%').
Label for cyclomatic complexity in the coverage summary (e.g. 'Total - Complexity: 95.0%').
Label for condition code coverage in the coverage summary (e.g. 'Total - Condition: 95.0%').
Label for function code coverage in the coverage summary (e.g. 'Total - Function: 95.0%').
Label for instruction code coverage in the coverage summary (e.g. 'Total - Instruction: 95.0%').
Label for line code coverage in the coverage summary (e.g. 'Total - Line: 95.0%').
Label for method code coverage in the coverage summary (e.g. 'Total - Method: 95.0%').
Label for region code coverage in the coverage summary (e.g. 'Total - Region: 95.0%').
Label for statement code coverage in the coverage summary (e.g. 'Total - Statement: 95.0%').
Placeholder shown instead of a percentage when a coverage metric has no coverable data.
Label for the assembly scope level in coverage threshold aggregation descriptions.
Label for the file scope level in coverage threshold aggregation descriptions.
Label for the module scope level in coverage threshold aggregation descriptions.
Label for the namespace scope level in coverage threshold aggregation descriptions.
Label for the whole-run (overall) scope in the coverage summary (e.g. 'Total - Line: 95.0%').
Label for the type scope level in coverage threshold aggregation descriptions.
Coverage threshold comparison shown when the threshold is not met. {0} is the actual coverage percentage, {1} is the threshold percentage.
Coverage threshold result shown when a scope has no coverable data and the configured policy treats that as a failure.
Coverage threshold result shown when a scope has no coverable data and the configured policy treats that as a pass.
Coverage threshold comparison shown when the threshold is met. {0} is the actual coverage percentage, {1} is the threshold percentage.
Heading printed before the coverage threshold pass/fail comparisons in the run summary.
Per-assembly discovery header printed by the dotnet test orchestrator; followed by the assembly path/target framework/architecture. {0} is the discovered test count.
dotnet test orchestrator discovery total across multiple assemblies. {0} is the discovered test count, {1} the assembly count.
dotnet test orchestrator discovery total for a single assembly. {0} is the discovered test count.

trans-unit.target: Découverte des tests à partir de
trans-unit.note: Per-assembly banner printed by the dotnet test orchestrator before discovering tests in an assembly; followed by the assembly path/target framework/architecture.
Label for the count of assemblies that failed without producing a failed test (crash / non-zero exit / handshake failure) in the run summary, e.g. 'error: 1'.
{0} is the number of errors in an assembly summary line
is followed by test name

trans-unit.target: Artéfacts produits dans les dossiers en cours de traitement :

trans-unit.source: Minimum expected tests policy violation, tests ran {0}, minimum expected {1}
trans-unit.target: Violation de stratégie de tests minimale attendue, tests exécutés {0}, minimum attendu {1}
trans-unit.note: {0} is the number of tests that ran. {1} is the minimum expected number of tests.
{0} is the number of additional active tests.
{0} is the number of currently running tests.

trans-unit.source: Out of process file artifacts produced:
trans-unit.target: Artefacts de fichier hors processus produits :

trans-unit.source: Press Ctrl+C again to force exit.
trans-unit.target: Appuyez de nouveau sur Ctrl+C pour forcer la fermeture.
trans-unit.note: {Locked="Ctrl+C"}
Suffix appended to the total test count in the run summary to indicate how many failed tests were retried, e.g. 'total: 5 (+2 retried)'.

trans-unit.target: Exécuter des tests à partir de
trans-unit.note: Per-assembly banner printed by the dotnet test orchestrator before running an assembly; followed by the assembly path/target framework/architecture.
at that is used for a stack frame location in a stack trace, is followed by a class and method name
in that is used in stack frame it is followed by file name

trans-unit.source: Control whether ANSI escape characters are emitted. Valid values are 'auto' (default), 'on' (also accepts 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (also accepts 'false', 'disable', '0'). 'on' forces ANSI escape codes (including cursor movement) even when stdout is redirected; pair it with --progress off if you only want colors. When both --ansi and --no-ansi are provided, --ansi wins.
trans-unit.target: Déterminez si des caractères d’échappement ANSI sont émis. Les valeurs valides sont 'auto' (par défaut), 'on' (accepte également 'true', 'enable', '1') ou 'off' (accepte également 'false', 'disable', '0'). 'on' force les codes d’échappement ANSI (notamment le déplacement du curseur) même lorsque stdout est redirigé, associez-le à --progress off si vous ne voulez que des couleurs. Lorsque --ansi et --no-ansi sont fournis, --ansi est prioritaire.
trans-unit.note: {Locked="'auto'"}{Locked="'on'"}{Locked="'true'"}{Locked="'enable'"}{Locked="'1'"}{Locked="'off'"}{Locked="'false'"}{Locked="'disable'"}{Locked="'0'"}{Locked="--progress off"}{Locked="--ansi"}{Locked="--no-ansi"}

trans-unit.source: --ansi expects a single parameter with value 'auto', 'on' (or 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (or 'false', 'disable', '0').
trans-unit.target: --ansi attend un seul paramètre avec la valeur « auto », « on » (ou « true », « enable », « 1 ») ou « off » (ou « false », « disable », « 0 »).
trans-unit.note: {Locked="--ansi"}{Locked="auto"}{Locked="on"}{Locked="true"}{Locked="enable"}{Locked="1"}{Locked="off"}{Locked="false"}{Locked="disable"}{Locked="0"}

trans-unit.source: Disable outputting ANSI escape characters to screen.
trans-unit.target: Désactiver la sortie des caractères d’échappement ANSI à l’écran.

trans-unit.source: [Deprecated, use '--progress off' instead] Disable reporting progress to screen.
trans-unit.target: [Déconseillé, utilisez « --progress off » à la place] Désactivez l’affichage de la progression à l’écran.
trans-unit.note: {Locked="--progress off"}

trans-unit.source: Output verbosity when reporting tests. Valid values are 'Normal', 'Detailed'. Default is 'Normal'.
trans-unit.target: Verbosité de la sortie lors de l’établissement des rapports de tests. Les valeurs valides sont « Normal » et « Detailed ». La valeur par défaut est « Normal ».
trans-unit.note: {Locked="Normal"}{Locked="Detailed"}

trans-unit.source: --output expects a single parameter with value 'Normal' or 'Detailed'.
trans-unit.target: --output attend un seul paramètre avec la valeur « Normal » ou « Detailed ».
trans-unit.note: {Locked="--output"}{Locked="Normal"}{Locked="Detailed"}

trans-unit.target: Exécution en cours... {0} terminés, {1} en échec
trans-unit.note: Heartbeat line emitted on non-cursor terminals when the run goes silent. {0} is the number of completed tests, {1} is the number of failed tests.
Suffix appended to the heartbeat line naming the currently active test. {0} is the active test name.

trans-unit.source: Control whether progress is reported to screen. Valid values are 'auto' (default), 'on' (also accepts 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (also accepts 'false', 'disable', '0'). 'auto' shows progress unless the terminal cannot update in place (for example with --no-ansi or in CI). This option takes precedence over the deprecated --no-progress flag.
trans-unit.target: Contrôlez si la progression est indiquée à l’écran. Les valeurs valides sont « auto » (par défaut), « on » (accepte également « true », « enable », « 1 ») ou « off » (accepte également « false », « disable », « 0 »). « auto » affiche la progression, sauf si le terminal ne peut pas être mis à jour sur place (par exemple avec --no-ansi ou dans CI). Cette option prévaut sur l’indicateur --no-progress déconseillé.
trans-unit.note: {Locked="auto"}{Locked="on"}{Locked="true"}{Locked="enable"}{Locked="1"}{Locked="off"}{Locked="false"}{Locked="disable"}{Locked="0"}{Locked="--no-ansi"}{Locked="--no-progress"}

trans-unit.source: --progress expects a single parameter with value 'auto', 'on' (or 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (or 'false', 'disable', '0').
trans-unit.target: --progress attend un seul paramètre avec la valeur « auto », « on » (ou « true », « enable », « 1 ») ou « off » (ou « false », « disable », « 0 »).
trans-unit.note: {Locked="--progress"}{Locked="auto"}{Locked="on"}{Locked="true"}{Locked="enable"}{Locked="1"}{Locked="off"}{Locked="false"}{Locked="disable"}{Locked="0"}
Line emitted on non-cursor terminals when a single test runs longer than the slow-test threshold. {0} is the elapsed duration, {1} is the test description. {Locked="[slow]"}

trans-unit.source: --show-stdout and --show-stderr expect a single parameter with value 'All', 'Failed', or 'None'.
trans-unit.target: --show-stdout et --show-stderr attendent un seul paramètre avec la valeur « All », « Failed » ou « None ».
trans-unit.note: {Locked="--show-stdout"}{Locked="--show-stderr"}{Locked="All"}{Locked="Failed"}{Locked="None"}

trans-unit.source: Show the specified number of slowest tests (by reported execution duration) in the run summary. Expects a positive integer.
trans-unit.target: Affichez le nombre spécifié de tests les plus lents (selon la durée d’exécution signalée) dans le résumé de l’exécution. Attend un entier positif.

trans-unit.source: --show-slowest-tests expects a single positive integer parameter.
trans-unit.target: --show-slowest-tests attend un seul paramètre entier positif.
trans-unit.note: {Locked="--show-slowest-tests"}

trans-unit.source: Determines when to show captured error output of a test. Valid values are 'All', 'Failed', 'None'. Default is 'All' (or 'Failed' when an LLM/AI agent environment is detected).
trans-unit.target: Permet de déterminer quand afficher la sortie d’erreur capturée d’un test. Les valeurs valides sont « All », « Failed » et « None ». La valeur par défaut est « All » (ou « Failed » lorsqu’un environnement d’agent LLM/IA est détecté).
trans-unit.note: {Locked="All"}{Locked="Failed"}{Locked="None"}

trans-unit.source: Determines when to show captured standard output of a test. Valid values are 'All', 'Failed', 'None'. Default is 'All' (or 'Failed' when an LLM/AI agent environment is detected).
trans-unit.target: Permet de déterminer quand afficher la sortie standard capturée d’un test. Les valeurs valides sont « All », « Failed » et « None ». La valeur par défaut est « All » (ou « Failed » lorsqu’un environnement d’agent LLM/IA est détecté).
trans-unit.note: {Locked="All"}{Locked="Failed"}{Locked="None"}

trans-unit.target: Écrit les résultats des tests dans le terminal.
Résumé de la découverte de tests : {0} test(s) trouvé(s)
trans-unit.note: {0} is the number of discovered tests.
number of tries of the current test assembly when test assembly is being retried. {0} is number that starts at 1
